TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Taylin, title = Taylin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taylin} }

S.FORM: taylin o pacaliwen no paylang a caciyaw, o Amilika no sowal i, plice mahaenay！
S.PHON: tajɾin o~u paʦaɾiwən no~u pajɾaŋ a ʦaʦijaw, o~u amiɾika no~u so~uwaɾ i, pɾiʦə maħaənaj*
S.FORM: taylin o pacaliwen no paylang a caciyaw, o Amilika no sowal i, plice mahaenay！
S.PHON: tajɾin o~u paʦaɾiwən no~u pajɾaŋ a ʦaʦijaw, o~u amiɾika no~u so~uwaɾ i, pɾiʦə maħaənaj*
